title: Industrial Solution Proposal Manager
description:
The Proposal Manager leads the proposal team to ensure the timely delivery of high-quality technical and commercial proposals that meet customer expectations and support sales targets. This role requires close collaboration with business development teams, technical experts, and other internal and external stakeholders to craft winning proposals for Mega Projects and Digital Transformation (DX) opportunities.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead and manage the proposal team to ensure consistency, accuracy, and completeness of all proposals, aligning with company standards and customer requirements.
  • Analyze customer RFQs in collaboration with Business Development (BD) teams to define technical and commercial strategy for proposal development.
  • Support proposal development for Mega Projects and DX solutions with a deep understanding of customer needs, competitive positioning, and value proposition.
  • Prepare and submit proposals, including Statements of Work (SOWs), ensuring alignment with internal capabilities and external customer requirements.
  • Respond to RFPs by articulating company’s value proposition, proposing competitive and cost-effective solutions that meet functional, technical, and budgetary requirements.
  • Manage stakeholder communications throughout the proposal lifecycle, including coordination with engineering, project management, legal, procurement, and sales teams.
  • Ensure proper documentation, cost estimation, risk identification, and pricing strategy are embedded in proposals.
  • Oversee order booking preparation and lead the handover process to the engineering execution team upon project award.

Requirements:

  • Minimum Degree in Information Technology/Computer Science/Chemical Engineering/Process Engineering
  • Minimum 8 years of working experiences in L3 digital solution such as APC, OTS, PIMS, Asset Management, etc. Related sales engineering or project engineering, preferably in industries like Oil & Gas, Material and life.
  • Relevant experience in ICSS system, such as DCS, FGS, etc.
  • Strong Knowledge and understanding of the major automation vendors, products, services and solutions.
  • Domain knowledge in ISA95, ISA88, OPC UA, MQTT, Modbus, Industry 4.0, MES Best practices and Data Security, Data Availability.
  • Experience in products like PRM, ISAE, Exquantum, Exapilot is the bonus.
  • Strong Technical writing skill with ability to simplify complex technical concepts for non -technical audiences.
  • Detailed-oriented with strong organizational skills

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
